title: Modern Glass Backport
description:
Are you playing an older version and don't like the appearance of glass? Then use this resource pack!

glass textures for legacy Minecraft.
body:
![Smooth rendering on with Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7290388a959fa13599f646d603e193d1ea4d8da1.jpeg)# Minecraft-Backporting-Glass-Textures

This resource pack backports the new glass texture to older versions and supports OptiFine's smooth rendering!

## Version without shader mod
![Smooth rendering on with Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1a0fde8a37593465a5504b845f2a777b6831c5.png)
